mapper.sql: r.region_id, r.region_name, r.is_active, r.created_by, r.created_at, r.updated_by, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_store s WHERE s.region_id = r.region_id AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.is_deleted = 0) AS store_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user u WHERE u.region_id = r.region_id AND u.is_deleted = 0) AS user_count
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_region r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0
AND r.region_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND r.is_active = #{isActive}
ORDER BY r.region_name ASC
SELECT FROM tb_region r WHERE r.region_id = #{regionId} AND r.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_region (region_name, is_active, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{regionName}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_region SET region_name = #{regionName}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE region_id = #{regionId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_region SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE region_id = #{regionId} AND is_deleted = 0
